description: Default track assignments for The Diminished Chord. Edit this file to set default music for all users.

instructions.howToUse: Add your S3/CDN URLs to the appropriate keys below. These will be loaded on game start for all users.
instructions.menuMusic: Keys like 'intro', 'main_menu', 'world_1' etc. control which music plays on menus and world select screens.
instructions.levelTracks: Keys like 'track_W1L1', 'track_W1BOSS' etc. control music for individual levels.
instructions.exporting: You can export your current assignments from the Track Uploader scene's Export button.
